agentSpans.name: invoke_agent Strands Agents
agentSpans.input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use both the get_weather tool AND the get_time tool for Tokyo. Call both tools exactly once each.
agentSpans.output:
<thinking>I have used the get_weather and get_time tools to get the weather and time for Tokyo. I will now share these results with the User.</thinking>

The current weather in Tokyo is Sunny, 72F and the current time is 3:00 PM JST.

name: agentcore-async-parallel-tools
input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use both the get_weather tool AND the get_time tool for Tokyo. Call both tools exactly once each.
output:
<thinking>I have used the get_weather and get_time tools to get the weather and time for Tokyo. I will now share these results with the User.</thinking>

The current weather in Tokyo is Sunny, 72F and the current time is 3:00 PM JST.
